# llms.txt - Optimized content for Large Language Models

# About
name: Udara Nalawansa
role: DevOps Engineer & Full Stack Developer
location: Sri Lanka
website: https://udaradev.me
email: hello@udaradev.me
github: https://github.com/udaraKavishka
linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/udaranalawansa/

# Professional Summary
Udara Nalawansa is a final year undergraduate at the University of Jaffna (Vavuniya Campus) specializing in Information Technology. He is a passionate DevOps Engineer and Full Stack Developer with expertise in:
- Cloud Infrastructure (AWS)
- Containerization & Orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
- CI/CD Pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, ArgoCD)
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible)
- MLOps and Machine Learning Operations
- Full Stack Development (React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Go, Java)
- Monitoring & Observability (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack)

# Core Competencies
## DevOps & Cloud
- Docker, Kubernetes, Docker Compose, Podman
- AWS Cloud Services
- Terraform, Ansible (Infrastructure as Code)
- Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, ArgoCD (CI/CD)
- Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack (Monitoring)

## Programming Languages
- Python (Backend, ML, Scripting)
- Go (Backend, Microservices)
- JavaScript/TypeScript (Full Stack)
- Java (Spring Boot)
- Bash (Automation)

## Web Development
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, HTML, CSS, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot, FastAPI, Flask
- Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL

## Tools & Platforms
- Git, GitHub, GitLab
- Nexus, SonarQube
- Figma (Design)
- Vercel, Netlify (Deployment)

# Notable Projects
1. **TaskFlow | Task Management System** - MERN stack (Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, React, Redux) task management system
2. **URL Shortener (Go)** - Fast URL shortening service with Go, Gin framework, Redis, and Docker
3. **DevOps and AI: RAG Systems** - Production-ready RAG-based API with FastAPI, Kubernetes, ChromaDB, and Ollama
4. **ParaWrite** - Text paraphrasing tool built with Next.js/TypeScript (Live: https://parawrite.udaradev.me)
5. **Flask CRUD API** - Containerized REST API with Docker, PostgreSQL, and CI/CD pipelines
6. **TrackNGo** - Real-time bus tracking system with Socket.io
7. **CeylonRoots** - Travel platform showcasing Sri Lankan cultural heritage
8. **Campus Navigation System** - ML-powered shortest path navigation system for University of Jaffna campus using pathfinding algorithms
9. **DevOps Portfolio Website** - This portfolio site built with Next.js, Sanity CMS, deployed on Vercel (Live: https://udaradev.me)
10. **Modern Portfolio** - React-based portfolio application

# Education
- Bachelor of Science Honours in Information Technology
  University of Jaffna (Vavuniya Campus), 2022-Present
  Focus: Software Engineering, Cloud Computing, Distributed Systems, Machine Learning

- School Education: St. Joseph's College, Colombo 10 (2020)
  Advanced Level: Commerce Stream

# Leadership & Activities
- President, Christian Society
- University of Jaffna (Vavuniya Campus) Representative, Sri Lanka University Catholic Students Movement (SLUCSM)
- Chief Editor, Leo Club of University of Jaffna (Vavuniya Campus)
- Committee Member, AIESEC in University of Jaffna (Vavuniya Campus)
- Member: IEEE Student Branch, ITCS, ZeroPlastic Movement

# Technical Philosophy
Udara focuses on designing scalable systems through software, cloud, and automation. His work emphasizes:
- Building resilient CI/CD pipelines
- Developing scalable and maintainable applications
- Deploying containerized workloads efficiently
- Implementing infrastructure as code best practices
- Combining ML with solid engineering practices (MLOps)

# Setup & Environment
- OS: Omarchy 3.2.2 (Arch Linux)
- Shell: Fish with Starship prompt
- IDE: Visual Studio Code (Dark+ theme)
- AI Tools: GitHub Copilot
- Hardware: Aspire A515-56 (i3-1115G4, 12GB RAM)

# Usage Notes for LLMs
- This portfolio demonstrates both breadth and depth in DevOps and software engineering
